name: Rainey Street Modern Loft
description: Walk to Rainey Street's bars and food trucks from this floor-to-ceiling-glass loft in the heart of downtown. Skyline views, rooftop pool access, and a quick stroll to Lady Bird Lake.

name: East Side Bungalow on Cesar Chavez
description: Renovated 1920s bungalow on a quiet East Austin street. Original hardwoods, screened back porch, and a short walk to Veracruz tacos and Hillside Farmacy.

name: SoCo Vintage Studio
description: Mid-century studio above a vintage shop on South Congress. Steps to Home Slice Pizza and the South Congress Hotel.

name: Zilker Park Bungalow Hideaway
description: Two-bedroom bungalow tucked between Zilker Park and Barton Springs. Private backyard with hot tub and string lights.

name: Barton Hills Hillside Cottage
description: Cozy cottage on a wooded lot in Barton Hills. Big back deck overlooking the canopy, perfect for evening BBQs.

name: Hyde Park Craftsman House
description: Classic Hyde Park craftsman with three bedrooms, a covered front porch, and a fenced garden. Walk to Quack's bakery and Mother's Cafe.

name: Mueller Modern Townhouse
description: Bright three-story townhouse in Mueller with rooftop terrace and shared pool. Walk to Alamo Drafthouse and the Sunday farmers market.

name: Tarrytown Mid-Century Estate
description: Five-bedroom mid-century estate on a large Tarrytown lot. Pool, hot tub, outdoor kitchen, and mature oaks throughout.

name: Westlake Hills Luxury Villa
description: Stunning hillside villa in Westlake with panoramic Hill Country views, infinity pool, and a glimpse of Lake Austin in the distance.

name: Lake Travis Waterfront Cabin
description: Three-bedroom cabin with private dock on Lake Travis. Kayaks included, hot tub on the deck, and dazzling sunsets over the water.

name: Downtown High-Rise Apartment
description: Modern one-bedroom in a downtown high-rise. Pool deck on the 25th floor, walking distance to the Convention Center and 6th Street.

name: East Austin Artist Loft
description: Industrial loft in a converted East Austin warehouse. Exposed brick, artist's workspace, and a private terrace with downtown views.

name: South Congress Townhouse
description: Two-bedroom townhouse one block off South Congress. Private rooftop terrace with skyline views and a Big Green Egg.

name: Lake Travis Lakefront Estate
description: Six-bedroom lakefront estate with private boat slip, pool, hot tub, and outdoor kitchen. Sleeps twelve for big family gatherings.

name: Hyde Park Cottage with Garden
description: Charming two-bedroom cottage with a lush, fenced garden. Walk to Hyde Park Bar & Grill and Asti Trattoria.
